message:
fix(tools): reject oversized replay events that would cause infinite chunking loop

chunk_timeline now rejects any single event whose serialized size exceeds
MAX_BUNDLE_BYTES - 2 with a new OversizedEvent error variant, preventing
an infinite loop or incorrect chunking. Minor struct-update refactor in
security_trust_metrics test helper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
